work_history.title: Junior Backend Developer
work_history.highlights: Built and maintained REST APIs for internal order management tooling. Wrote raw SQL queries against PostgreSQL for reporting.

resume_text: Backend Developer with 2 years of experience using Django and PostgreSQL for internal tooling. Built and maintained REST APIs for a small e-commerce platform. Some exposure to Docker for local development, no production deployment experience. Comfortable with Git and basic CI pipelines.
